name: softlight
description: Generate and implement design directions for product design problems. Explores alternatives, makes code changes, and wires the app so you can see results immediately.

interface.longDescription: Use Softlight to explore design directions, make code changes, and wire the app so results are visible immediately.
defaultPrompt: Explore design directions for this product problem
Implement a selected UI direction in this codebase
Wire the app so I can preview the result
